speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Discussing arguments
questions: Do you support or oppose online learning?
What would happen if all schools became online?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I support online learning because it saves time. There is evidence that students can learn flexibly this way. Nevertheless, if all schools became online, students would have fewer social experiences.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Education, work, and technology
questions: How has technology changed the way students learn?
What skills will be important for future jobs?
If you could learn one new skill, what would it be?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Technology has changed the way students learn by making lessons more interactive. Digital skills will be important for future jobs. If I could learn one new skill, I would learn computer programming.
